comment: The recurrent-key list (DESIGN_QUESTS §5): WorldState keys whose states the sim GUARANTEES return — seasons turn, weather passes, snow melts. Owned by the game, read by the spine lint (§3): a spine thread's path-to-terminal may gate on these or on player-writable keys, nothing else — so time and weather can never permanently close a spine door, only delay it. Grows one key at a time, with the mirror that earns it.
